creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
devel/libgit2 builds fine (with a warning) but will probably crash at runtime:

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR216157-default/2017-01-17_09h02m14s/logs/libgit2-0.24.0.log

devel/pecl-qb builds fine (with warnings) but will probably crash at runtime:

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR216157-default/2017-01-17_09h02m14s/logs/pecl-qb-2.4.0_3.log

For the ports that build successfully but disable warnings, I can't think of a way to detect them.

Those ports fail to build, and 652 new ports were skipped due to those failures:

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR216157-default/2017-01-17_09h02m14s/logs/errors/midipp-1.3.3.log
http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR216157-default/2017-01-17_09h02m14s/logs/errors/swi-pl-7.2.3_1.log
http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR216157-default/2017-01-17_09h02m14s/logs/errors/hashcat-3.30.log
http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR216157-default/2017-01-17_09h02m14s/logs/errors/raptor2-2.0.15_5.log
